title: Turbulent Length Scale for Multilayer RANS Model of Urban Canopy and Its Evaluation Based on Large-Eddy Simulations

source.journal_pages: SuperFri.org / JSFI Vol. 8 No. 4 (2021); PDF ~17 pages

q1_observation_simulation_comparison.evidence: Abstract + Sect. 6, Fig. 4: multilayer K-l RANS compared only with INM RAS LES (EXP1-3) for U/U* and scalar concentration profiles; no field, lidar, tower, or wind-tunnel measurements in this study. Introduction cites prior lab/COSMO/LES literature but authors state real-city measurements are infeasible for component evaluation.

q3_meaning_without_observation.summary: 作者以 GCM 垂直分辨率提升、城市冠层需多层一维 RANS 闭合为动机，指出真实城市观测受外部气象与空间非均匀性干扰、难以独立评估模型分量；故在理想化统计平衡条件下以 LES 为基准评估 RANS，并提出仅含一个经验常数、依赖位移高度 Du 而非显式几何的湍流长度尺度参数化，在低密度冠层与标量输运上可与或优于 Nazarian et al. [19] 的几何标定方案，为将来嵌入天气预报/气候模式提供可行路径。
arguments: Introduction: 超算使 GCM 可解析大都市尺度，需发展考虑建筑物体 drag/TKE 产的多层一维 RANS；真实城市测量难隔离模型分量，理想化平衡同质条件更适于评估。
Introduction: 高 Re 城市冠层实验室实验困难，LES/DNS 可提供低噪声、可解析冠层内湍流的可靠数据以构建/验证多层 RANS（引用 Cheng & Castro、Coceal 等与 LES 一致的风洞/LES 先例）。
Introduction + Sect. 5-6: 研究目标为低密度几何（EXP1-3）及冠层内标量湍流扩散；提出基于量纲分析与 Du 的 l_T 参数化（c1=0.4），Fig. 4 显示多数情形下优于或不差于 [19] 的几何函数标定，且保留近壁/冠顶渐近。
Conclusions: LES 作为多层 RANS 评估基准；简单 K-l 闭合+单常数调参即可复现平均风速与标量浓度，未来需更多 LES/DNS 构型以严格验证并扩展至浮力/热湿交换。

self_assessment.caveats: Analysis from marker Markdown (pdftext quality good); paper explicitly LES-only validation—Q1 boundary clear; prior field/wind-tunnel refs are background not new obs-sim; raster Fig. 4 not re-digitized.

content.notes: skipped_q2_due_to_q1_false; literature-obs-sim-comparison-analysis SKILL; user requested no AUTO-CHECKPOINT update.

title: Comprehensive Evaluation of Fast-Response, Reynolds-Averaged Navier–Stokes, and Large-Eddy Simulation Methods Against High-Spatial-Resolution Wind-Tunnel Data in Step-Down Street Canyons

source.journal_pages: Boundary-Layer Meteorol. (2017); published online 18 May 2017; marker ~27 pages

instruments: Step-down street-canyon wind tunnel with particle-imaging velocimetry (PIV; Addepalli & Pardyjak 2015)

Authors vary Hd/Hu (~0–0.69) and S/W (~1, 2.5). No field mast/lidar validation in this study—only wind-tunnel benchmark.
q2_observation_spatial_type.rationale: All explicit obs–sim comparisons use controlled wind-tunnel PIV as the measurement reference, not outdoor single- or multi-layer field networks.

title: Computational Fluid Dynamics for urban physics: Importance, scales, possibilities, limitations and ten tips and tricks towards accurate and reliable simulations

source.markdown_path: docs/reference-candidate/marker_out/Computational Fluid Dynamics for urban physics/Computational Fluid Dynamics for urban physics.md
source.journal_pages: Build. Environ. 91 (2015) 219-245; Golden Issue review ~27 pages

q1_observation_simulation_comparison.evidence: Abstract + Sect. 6: review/position paper on CFD for urban physics and ten BPG-complement tips; no new case-study sim outputs compared to measurements. Fig. 18 CFD–PIV and Fig. 19 GCI reproduced from Ramponi & Blocken [73] for illustration; Sect. 5.9 advises validation/sub-configuration validation but reports no original obs–sim metrics.

q3_meaning_without_observation.summary: 作者以城市物理应对气候、能源、健康等社会挑战为框架，系统梳理空间尺度与模型类别，并在既有 COST/AIJ 等 BPG 基础上提出十条 CFD 实操建议，论证高质量数值模拟对城市物理研究与设计的持续必要性；全文定位为综述与立场论文而非个案验证研究。
arguments: Abstract + Sect. 1–2: 城市化与社会挑战使城市物理/CFD 成为关键评估工具，本文旨在综述重要性、尺度与 CFD 机遇/局限（非提交新验证算例）。
Sect. 4.3 + 5: 汇总 ERCOFTAC/COST732/AIJ 等既有 BPG，并补充方向性阻塞比、网格挤出、z0/kS 粗糙度等十条技巧以提升模拟可信度。
Sect. 5.9 + 6: 强调验证不可或缺，但承认多数工程案例缺现场数据，主张子构型验证与数据库（CEDVAL/AIJ/CODASC）；结论展望 LES BPG 与算力发展。
Golden Issue 语境（Acknowledgments）: 为 Building and Environment 50 周年特刊提供领域综述与最佳实践导向，价值在于知识整合与规范推广而非观测对比。

self_assessment.caveats: Analysis from marker Markdown; Fig. 18–19 explicitly attributed to Ref. [73]; no original PDF path in repo; raster figures not re-digitized.

instruments: 32 Beijing meteorological observatories (2 m temperature, 10 m wind)
Hamburg MI wind tunnel (1:200 rectangular building, velocity/TKE profiles)

Secondary: OpenFOAM pre-validation vs wind-tunnel (Sect. 3). WRF–OpenFOAM Zhongguancun 1 km domain flow/dispersion (Sect. 4.3) has no field benchmark.
q2_observation_spatial_type.rationale: Main mesoscale case validation uses standard single-height surface station variables aggregated over 32 sites, not vertical profiles or lidar; wind tunnel supports CFD setup only.

WRF mesoscale run provides lateral/top BC only—not validated against these stations in this paper.
